extract: Lucario (Japanese: ルカリオ Lucario) is a dual-type Fighting/Steel Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from Riolu when leveled up with high friendship during the day. Lucario can Mega Evolve into two different forms: Mega Lucario using the Lucarionite. Mega Lucario Z using the Lucarionite Z. Mega Lucario Z was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
